common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: shop_id
common_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a shop. Required param for most APIs.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token, shop_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

define: Use this api to update shop level logistics channel's configuration.

request_params.name: enabled
request_params.description: Whether to enable this logistic channel.

request_params.name: cod_enabled
request_params.description: Whether to enable COD for this logistic channel. Only COD supported channels are applicable.

children.description: Whether to enable Auto Call Driver for this logistic channel.
children.name: auto_call_driver_enabled

children.description:
Used to set the Preparation Time for this channel, in minutes. Required when auto_call_driver_enabled = true.


Note: Please ensure the passed preparation_time value falls within the preparation_time_limit range returned by v2.logistics.get_channel_list.
children.name: preparation_time

response_params.name: request_id
response_params.description: The identifier of the API request for error tracking.

response_params.name: error
response_params.description: Indicate error type if hit error. Empty if no error happened.

response_params.name: message
response_params.description: Indicate error details if hit error. Empty if no error happened.

children.name: shop_id
children.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a shop.

children.name: enabled
children.description: Whether this logistic channel is enabled.

children.name: cod_enabled
children.description: Whether COD is enabled for this channel.
List of channels that are updated in the operation (inclusive of dependent logistics channels)
children.name: updated_channels

children.description: Indicate whether Auto Call Driver is currently enabled for this channel.
children.name: auto_call_driver_enabled

children.description: The current valid preparation time for this channel, in minutes.
children.name: preparation_time

request_sample.value:
<?php

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
  CURLOPT_URL => 'https://partner.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/logistics/update_channel?access_token=access_token&partner_id=partner_id&shop_id=shop_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp',
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
  CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'POST',
  CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS => '{
    "cod_enabled": true,
    "enabled": true,
    "logistics_channel_id": 14623,
    "preferred": true
}',
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
    'Content-Type: application/json'
  ),
));

$response = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);
echo $response;

curl --location --request POST 'https://partner.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/logistics/update_channel?partner_id=partner_id&sign=sign&access_token=access_token&timestamp=timestamp&shop_id=shop_id' \
--header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
--data-raw '{
   "cod_enabled": true,
   "enabled": true,
   "logistics_channel_id": 14623,
   "preferred": true
}'

import requests
import json

url = "https://partner.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/logistics/update_channel?access_token=access_token&partner_id=partner_id&shop_id=shop_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp"

payload=json.dumps({
  "cod_enabled": True,
  "enabled": True,
  "logistics_channel_id": 14623,
  "preferred": True
})
headers = {
  'Content-Type': 'application/json'
}
response = requests.request("POST",url,headers=headers, data=payload, allow_redirects=False)

print(response.text)

update_log_list.content: Add auto_call_driver_setting request and response parameters
sunset the request parameters "preferred" since "Preferred channel setting is no longer supported".
